message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxPadding 10
}

actor "User/Admin" as UA

box "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #BFE7F2
  participant "CLI" as CLI
  participant "Af Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #98F08F
  participant "NEF" as NEF
  participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
end box

note over NEF
Smart Edge Open provided
Core component with
limited functionality
end note

group "Policy Authorization – Application Session Context GET flow"
  UA -> CLI : Get app session context with\nappSessionId
  CLI -> AF : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
  AF -> NGC : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
  NGC --> AF : 200 OK: app-session\ninformation \\ ERROR
  AF --> CLI : 200 OK: app-session\ninformation \\ ERROR
  CLI --> UA : Success: app-session\ninformation
end group

@enduml
```
